'''''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 5''' is the fifth volume in the [[Dark Horse Comics]] black-and-white collections of the original [[Marvel Comics]] series of comic books.

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]]
*[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 2|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 2]]
